query:
-- 1. Reword May 25+ roster row as "summer break"
UPDATE tutorRosterOverride
   SET note = 'Summer break — Indian Hill 2025–26 school year ended Thu May 21, 2026. No school. (Reagan''s homeschool follows the Indian Hill calendar.)'
 WHERE week_start_date = '2026-05-25';

-- 2. Insert empty Thu May 21 plan (last day of school year). Idempotent via ON DUPLICATE KEY on date.
INSERT INTO dailyPlans (date, dayType, status, notes, isTemplate, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('2026-05-21', 'full', 'planned',
        'Last day of Indian Hill 2025–26 school year. Mom + Grandma teaching (Sophie''s last day was Tue May 19). Plan blocks before this morning.',
        0, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  notes = VALUES(notes);

-- 3. Confirm
SELECT id, date, dayType, status, LEFT(notes, 200) AS notes
FROM dailyPlans
WHERE date BETWEEN '2026-05-15' AND '2026-05-22'
ORDER BY date;

SELECT id, week_start_date, active_tutor_names_json, helper_names_json, LEFT(note, 250) AS note
FROM tutorRosterOverride
WHERE week_start_date >= '2026-05-11'
ORDER BY week_start_date;

   SET note = 'Summer break — Indian Hill 2025–26 school year ended Thu May 21, 2026. No school. (Reagan''s homeschool follows the Indian Hill calendar.)'
 WHERE week_start_date = '2026-05-25';

-- 2. Insert empty Thu May 21 plan (last day of school year). Idempotent via ON DUPLICATE KEY on date.
INSERT INTO dailyPlans (date, dayType, status, notes, isTemplate, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('2026-05-21', 'full', 'planned',
        'Last day of Indian Hill 2025–26 school year. Mom + Grandma teaching (Sophie''s last day was Tue May 19). Plan blocks before this morning.',
        0, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  notes = VALUES(notes);

-- 3. Confirm
SELECT id, date, dayType, status, LEFT(notes, 200) AS notes
FROM dailyPlans
WHERE date BETWEEN '2026-05-15' AND '2026-05-22'

SELECT id, week_start_date, active_tutor_names_json, helper_names_json, LEFT(note, 250) AS note
FROM tutorRosterOverride
WHERE week_start_date >= '2026-05-11'
ORDER BY week_start_date;

rows.notes: 2026-05-15: marked skipped — no blocks were added for today, fresh start Monday.
Last day of Indian Hill 2025–26 school year. Mom + Grandma teaching (Sophie's last day was Tue May 19). Plan blocks before this morning.
Sophie is the only tutor. This is her last week. Standing hours Mon/Thu/Fri 10–3, Tue May 19 shortened 10–1 (her final session). Wed off. Mom + Grandma take over Wed May 20 onward.
Sophie Mon May 18 10–3, Tue May 19 10–1 (final session). Starting Wed May 20: NO tutors — Mom + Grandma run school for the rest of the year.
Summer break — Indian Hill 2025–26 school year ended Thu May 21, 2026. No school. (Reagan's homeschool follows the Indian Hill calendar.)
